name: Fractal Descent
description: An endless cinematic fall into a Mandelbox cathedral-world — recursive chambers opening into deeper chambers. FD.1 maquette: the ported Rrrola/Fragmentarium Mandelbox distance estimator plus a self-similar scale descent that wraps seamlessly onto itself, with orbit-trap colour and one maquette material. Audio routing, materials, god-rays and fog are FD.2-FD.3; this increment exists to measure the geometry against the Tier-2 budget.
author: Matt
